---
title: ""
---

```{=html}
<div class="contact-wrapper">

  <div class="contact-intro">
    <p class="contact-tagline">Let's talk.</p>
    <p class="contact-sub">Collaborations · Climate & Art · Science Communication · or just hello :)</p>
  </div>

  <div class="contact-grid">

    <!-- Izquierda: redes -->
    <div class="contact-social">
      <p class="contact-section-label">// find me online</p>
      <div class="social-links">
        <a href="http://www.linkedin.com/in/sabelasanfiz" target="_blank" class="social-item">
          <i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i>
          <span>LinkedIn</span>
          <span class="social-arrow">→</span>
        </a>
        <a href="https://bsky.app/profile/sabelasanfiz.bsky.social" target="_blank" class="social-item">
          <i class="bi bi-cloud-fill"></i>
          <span>Bluesky</span>
          <span class="social-arrow">→</span>
        </a>
        <a href="https://github.com/Sanfiz" target="_blank" class="social-item">
          <i class="bi bi-github"></i>
          <span>GitHub</span>
          <span class="social-arrow">→</span>
        </a>
        <a href="mailto:sabelasanfiz@gmail.com" class="social-item">
          <i class="bi bi-envelope-fill"></i>
          <span>Email</span>
          <span class="social-arrow">→</span>
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Derecha: formulario -->
    <div class="contact-form-box">
      <p class="contact-section-label">// send a message</p>
      <div class="contact-form-inner">
        <div class="form-field">
          <label for="name">Name</label>
          <input type="text" id="name" placeholder="Your name"/>
        </div>
        <div class="form-field">
          <label for="message">Message</label>
          <textarea id="message" rows="5" placeholder="What's on your mind?"></textarea>
        </div>
        <button class="send-btn" onclick="sendEmail()">
          Send message <span class="send-arrow">↗</span>
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>

</div>

<style>
.contact-wrapper {
  max-width: 820px;
  margin: 2rem auto 4rem auto;
  padding: 0 1.5rem;
}

.contact-intro {
  margin-bottom: 2.5rem;
}

.contact-tagline {
  font-size: 2.4rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: var(--mustard) !important;
  margin: 0 0 0.4rem 0;
  line-height: 1.1;
}

.contact-sub {
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  color: #888;
  margin: 0;
}

.contact-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1.4fr;
  gap: 2.5rem;
  align-items: start;
}

/* ── Social ── */
.contact-section-label {
  font-family: monospace;
  font-size: 0.68rem;
  color: var(--vanilla);
  letter-spacing: 0.12em;
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
}

.social-links {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 0.4rem;
}

.social-item {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.8rem;
  padding: 0.75rem 1rem;
  border-radius: 8px;
  text-decoration: none;
  color: var(--carbon) !important;
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.6);
  border: 1px solid #e8e4dc;
  font-size: 0.88rem;
  transition: all 0.2s ease;
}

.social-item:hover {
  background: white;
  border-color: var(--mustard);
  color: var(--mustard) !important;
  transform: translateX(4px);
}

.social-item i {
  font-size: 1rem;
  width: 16px;
  text-align: center;
}

.social-arrow {
  margin-left: auto;
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  opacity: 0;
  transition: opacity 0.2s;
}

.social-item:hover .social-arrow {
  opacity: 1;
}

/* ── Form ── */
.contact-form-inner {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 1rem;
}

.form-field {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 0.35rem;
}

.form-field label {
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: var(--vanilla);
  letter-spacing: 0.06em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.form-field input,
.form-field textarea {
  width: 100%;
  padding: 0.75rem 1rem;
  border: 1px solid #e0dbd0;
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.7);
  font-family: inherit;
  font-size: 0.88rem;
  color: var(--carbon);
  transition: border-color 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
  resize: none;
}

.form-field input:focus,
.form-field textarea:focus {
  outline: none;
  border-color: var(--mustard);
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(146,167,242,0.15);
}

.send-btn {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.5rem;
  padding: 0.75rem 1.6rem;
  background: var(--mustard);
  color: white !important;
  border: none;
  border-radius: 8px;
  font-size: 0.88rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: opacity 0.2s, transform 0.2s;
  align-self: flex-start;
  font-family: inherit;
}

.send-btn:hover {
  opacity: 0.88;
  transform: translateY(-2px);
}

.send-arrow {
  font-size: 1rem;
}

@media (max-width: 640px) {
  .contact-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .contact-tagline { font-size: 1.8rem; }
}
</style>

<script>
function sendEmail() {
  const name = document.getElementById('name').value;
  const message = document.getElementById('message').value;
  const subject = encodeURIComponent('Message from ' + name);
  const body = encodeURIComponent('From: ' + name + '\n\n' + message);
  window.location.href = 'mailto:sabelasanfiz@gmail.com?subject=' + subject + '&body=' + body;
}
</script>
```
